topic: GC vs ES biweekly differential Jan 19-30
summary: Gold futures vs S&P 500 futures return differential analysis for Jan 19-30 2026 period
content:
Key findings:
- GC=F at ~4314 (Jan 2), ES=F at ~6900 (Jan 2)
- Gold had massive 2025 rally (~55%), JPM targets $5,055/oz by Q4 2026
- Gold pulled back sharply from Dec 26 peak ($4,529) to Jan 2 ($4,314), -4.7%
- S&P trading sideways around 6,900
- Actual daily vol: GC ~1.17%, ES ~0.74%, correlation ~0.32
- Biweekly differential vol: ~3.67pp (actual recent data), ~4.97pp (longer-term assumptions)
- Historical biweekly differentials ranged from +0.21pp to +4.64pp (during gold rally) and -3.35pp (during pullback)
- Mean differential slightly positive (~0.3pp) due to gold's secular uptrend
- Very wide uncertainty: 2-week periods are dominated by noise, not trend
